KeysToEntries.CannotEquipBrokenItem: You cannot equip a broken item.
KeysToEntries.LackResourcesToRepair: You lack the resources to repair this.
KeysToEntries.BaseUnderAttack: A warband is attacking your base!
KeysToEntries.RaidOver: The warband has stopped attacking your base.
KeysToEntries.TooMuchWeight: You are carrying too much weight!
KeysToEntries.Boundary: An unknown force prevents you from going further.
KeysToEntries.Hungry: You start to feel hungry again.
KeysToEntries.Floating: You can't place this in the air.
KeysToEntries.RequiresFlatSurface: The spell must be cast on a flat surface.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresFireProcessingStation: This spell must be cast on a fire-powered processing station.
KeysToEntries.SafeSpawn: Your last location was blocked, so you have respawned in a safe place.
KeysToEntries.VelgarWrathStart: The air grows heavy and oppressive—Velgar descends upon Blueflame Keep.
KeysToEntries.VelgarWrathEnd: Velgar grows bored and withdraws... for now.
KeysToEntries.VelgarBreath: A terrible roar poisons the air.
KeysToEntries.VelgarMeteors: Velgar soars above. Death rains below.
KeysToEntries.CannotEquipEntitlement: You do not have the right to wear this.
KeysToEntries.HydrationLow: Your throat feels dry, you could do with a drink of water.
KeysToEntries.HydrationCritical: Your lips crack and your heart races from dehydration.
KeysToEntries.HydrationZero: You are critically dehydrated. Your body can’t take much more of this.
KeysToEntries.EnduranceLow: You’re tired and your eyelids feel really heavy. You could use a nap.
KeysToEntries.EnduranceCritical: You’re absolutely knackered and your legs barely want to move. Time for a rest.
KeysToEntries.EnduranceZero: You’re exhausted. You can’t go on like this, get some rest.
KeysToEntries.SustenanceLow: Your stomach growls. You could do with a snack.
KeysToEntries.SustenanceCritical: Your stomach aches from hunger. You need to eat something.
KeysToEntries.SustenanceZero: Your stomach writhes in pain. You stand at Death’s door from hunger.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresTree: The spell must be cast on a tree.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresCooking: The spell must be cast on a cooking range.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresPlantedVeg: The spell must be cast on a planted vegetable.
KeysToEntries.EnduranceHalf: You cannot stifle a yawn as your tiredness hits you.
KeysToEntries.DyingInDungeon: You can retrieve your gravestone outside the dungeon entrance.
KeysToEntries.SoulscourgeEightyfivePercentWarning: Your soul begins to fray. Soulscourge will soon ravage your health.
KeysToEntries.GravestonePlacedOutsideVaultMessage: Your gravestone has been placed safely outside the vault entrance.
KeysToEntries.VaultRecipeDispenser: You receive the wisdom of the ancients.
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationFloat: You can't place this in the air.
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationFoundation: You need a foundation to build this.
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationMissingMaterials: You require more materials to build this.
KeysToEntries.CannotEquipNeedSkillPerk: You do not have the required Skill Perk to equip this.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresEnemy: This spell must be cast on a creature.
KeysToEntries.PlayerPowerLevelInsufficientToConfuse: Your Power Level is not high enough to Confuse this Creature.
KeysToEntries.Resting.TooEarly: Taking a nap to recover fatigue, since it's too early to sleep through the night.
KeysToEntries.SpellRequiresGreaterConfuse: You need the Greater Confuse perk to confuse this target.
KeysToEntries.Cosiness.Start: You're cozy near your base and bed. Sustenance, Hydration and Rest drain slower.
KeysToEntries.Resting.TryToSleep: Resting. Waiting for {PlayersNotInBed}/{TotalPlayers} players to sleep.
KeysToEntries.Resting.PlayerWantsToSleep: {PlayerName} wants to sleep ({PlayersInBed}/{TotalPlayers} players in bed).
KeysToEntries.DestroyBuildingProtectedArea: Only the Host can destroy this.
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationProtectedArea: Only the Host can build here.
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationReachedCountLimit: Placement limit reached for this piece.
KeysToEntries.ChestContentsPrivate: The contents are private. You do not have access to it.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.AlmostActive: You can feel your soul begin to fray.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.Active: You feel your spirit fray, you are soul-rifted. Seek a purification pool to restore yourself before it's too late.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.HuntedByAi: The tormented dead seek you from the Underworld!
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.Critical: Imaru catches your scent. Seek a purification pool before she finds you!
KeysToEntries.ImaruBreath: Imaru grows impatient for your demise.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.Teleportation: It's too dangerous to risk teleporting while you are soul-rifted!
KeysToEntries.BuildingValidationShelter: You can only place this outside
KeysToEntries.Mounts.Title: Mounts

KeysToEntries.Fishing_UI_Notification_NoNodeDetectedAt: Missed a fishing spot. Try again!

KeysToEntries.Fishing_UI_Notification_Net_PowerLevelTo: Your net is not powerful enough to be efficient at this fishing spot.
